findings.title: Description issues instructions to the model
findings.detail: Description of "submit_support_request" contains imperative instructions directed at the AI assistant rather than describing the tool. This is the core tool-poisoning technique.

evidence.snippet: Submit a support request to the Skala team on behalf of the user. Call this when the user needs human assistance that AI cannot provide, the question is too com…

findings.remediation: Treat the server as untrusted; the model may obey embedded instructions.

name: submit_support_request
description: Submit a support request to the Skala team on behalf of the user. Call this when the user needs human assistance that AI cannot provide, the question is too complex or high-risk, or the user explicitly asks for human support. IMPORTANT: Always confirm with the user before calling — describe what you

findings.title: Description uses pressure/override language
findings.detail: Description of "submit_support_request" stacks urgency/override words (important, always). Legitimate tool descriptions rarely pressure the model to act or ignore prior guidance.
